data.title: Dimension Hospitality wins Guest Service Provider of the Year for 2025 due to culture, service, and innovation excellence.
data.description: Dimension Hospitality has been acknowledged by Hospitality Business Review for their exceptional culture, service, and innovation. Based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., on Dec. 23, 2025, the company received recognition for their dedication to these key areas. This award highlights their commitment to excellence in hospitality, showcasing the impact of their efforts on the industry. Dimension Hospitality's achievements in these aspects are lauded by industry experts, further solidifying their position as a leader in the field.

data.title: Trump blames high unemployment rate on decrease in government jobs. Claims he could reduce it to practically zero, all new jobs in private sector.
data.description: President Donald Trump recently discussed the increase in the unemployment rate, attributing it to a decline in government jobs. He emphasized that all new jobs are emerging within the private sector. Speaking at a drug pricing press conference, Trump acknowledged the uptick in unemployment, stating that the primary cause was a significant reduction in government employment. He highlighted that this decrease in government jobs is unprecedented and is expected to continue. The president mentioned that there were "millions and millions" of individuals in the federal workforce who held jobs but never reported to work. Trump also mentioned the possibility of reducing the unemployment rate to as low as 2% or 1%.

data.title: Trump announces new 'Golden Fleet' battleships. South Korean Hanwha Ocean stocks surge 12.5% after $5B deal to build U.S. Navy warships in Philadelphia. More on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Hanwha Ocean, a South Korean shipbuilder, saw its shares rise by 12.5% in Seoul following an announcement by President Donald Trump. Trump revealed that the company will take part in constructing a new series of warships for the U.S. Navy, which will be produced at the Hanwha Philly Shipyard in Philadelphia. This initiative is part of a larger U.S.-South Korea trade agreement, with Hanwha Ocean committing to a $5 billion investment in its Philadelphia shipyard. These warships, referred to as "Trump-Class Battleships" by Navy Secretary John Phelan, are set to include the USS Defiant, touted as the largest, deadliest, and most versatile vessel. The official announcement was made at an event hosted at Trump's Mar-a-Lago estate in Florida.

data.title: Fonds de solidarité FTQ's share value hits $67.98, up by $3.46 in half of fiscal 2025-2026, making $1.2 billion profit.
data.description: The Fonds de solidarité FTQ reported significant growth and positive financial results for the six-month period ended November 30, 2025. The comprehensive income (profit) for this period was $1.2 billion, with net assets increasing to $23.0 billion. The share value rose to $67.98, marking an increase of $3.46 since June 23, 2025, and $4.27 since December 23, 2024. The Fonds invested $557 million in the Québec economy through its regional, local, and real estate network. The Fonds delivered a six-month return of 5.4%, a 12-month return of 6.7%, and annual compound returns of 8.4% over 3 years, 6.7% over 5 years, and 7.3% over 10 years. The Fonds' performance benefited over 816,000 savers. These results were detailed in a news article on Benzinga.com dated December 23, 2025.

data.title: Parsons chosen to design VIA Rapid Silver Line in San Antonio by VIA Metropolitan Transit Authority.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia on December 23, 2025, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) revealed their recent selection by the VIA Metropolitan Transit Authority (VIA) to finalize the design for the Advanced Rapid Transit (ART) initiative for the VIA Rapid Silver Line project in San Antonio.

data.title: Strategy sells more stock to cover interest obligations, prepares for storm after Bitcoin rally disappointment.
data.description: Strategy recently decided to sell additional stock in order to bolster its reserve fund to meet interest obligations. Despite this move, Bitcoin did not receive the expected boost from the Santa Rally, leaving Strategy prepared for potential challenges ahead. The decision to increase the reserve fund comes amidst a shifting market landscape, highlighting the company's proactive approach to managing financial uncertainty.

data.title: TransUnion appoints Sayan Chakraborty and Charlotte Yarkoni to its Board of Directors, effective Jan 5, 2026.
data.description: TransUnion, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TRU, announced on December 23, 2025, that Sayan Chakraborty and Charlotte Yarkoni have been appointed to its Board of Directors. The new members will officially join the board on January 5, 2026.

data.title: Marisa Tomei's Terra Mare Derma Renew wins 2025 Beauty & Collagen Innovation Award for helping mature skin look firmer.
data.description: Recognized for its noticeable lifting results and capacity to enhance the appearance of aging skin by making it more firm, plump, and youthful, Terra Mare® has been commended. Created by Academy Award winner Marisa Tomei, the supplement brand based in Los Angeles received this honor on December 23, 2025, as reported by PRNewswire.

data.title: Aptos (APT) aims for $1.24-$1.61 by Q1 2026 with mixed signals. Price may dip to $1.24 but upgrade could push it to $1.61 soon.
data.description: The forecast for APT indicates a downward trend with a potential decline to the support level of $1.24; however, progress in quantum upgrades might lead to a rebound towards a resistance level of $1.61 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Q101 Foundation partners with Mynd.ai to expand North American market; MOU signed with global tech leader. (Total characters: 108)
data.description: In Seattle on December 23, 2025, the Q101 Foundation revealed its plans to establish a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Mynd.ai, a prominent player in classroom technology listed on the NYSE American as MYND. Mynd.ai will take on the role of collaborating with the Foundation as outlined in the MOU.
